description: Table containing information about identity and access exposure for various assets.

columns.name: num_admin_accounts
columns.description: Number of admin accounts associated with the asset.

columns.name: num_stale_accounts
columns.description: Number of stale accounts associated with the asset.

columns.name: has_password_reuse
columns.description: Indicates if there is password reuse for the asset.

columns.name: has_mfa_disabled
columns.description: Indicates if multi-factor authentication is disabled for the asset.

columns.name: assessed_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the assessment was made.

columns.name: updated_at
columns.description: Timestamp when the record was last updated.

grain: Each row represents exposure information for a specific asset.
data_quality_concerns: asset_id is a STRING and may not be unique if not properly enforced.
num_admin_accounts and num_stale_accounts could be null if not populated.
Boolean fields may have inconsistent values if not standardized.
recommended_transformations: Ensure asset_id is unique and properly indexed.
Implement checks to ensure num_admin_accounts and num_stale_accounts are non-null.
Standardize Boolean fields to ensure consistent true/false values.
